# Coqui — AI Agent in Your Browser

> Privacy-first AI agent chat client that runs entirely in your browser via WebAssembly. No server-side code, no tracking, your data stays on your device.

## Links
- Project Website: https://agentcoqui.com
- Documentation: https://docs.agentcoqui.com
- Hosted App: https://app.coquibot.ai
- GitHub (Core): https://github.com/AgentCoqui/coqui
- GitHub (App): https://github.com/AgentCoqui/coqui-app
- php-agents Framework: https://github.com/carmelosantana/php-agents
- Discord: https://discord.gg/TaCpZVqbbT

## What This Is
Coqui is a cross-platform AI agent chat client. This web version compiles to WebAssembly (WASM-GC) for native-speed execution directly in the browser. It is a full-featured Progressive Web App (PWA) that can be installed on any device.

## Core Features
- Privacy-first — all data stored locally in your browser via OPFS and IndexedDB
- WebAssembly-powered — full SQLite database and native-speed execution via WASM-GC
- Connect anywhere — works with local or remote Coqui API servers
- Cross-platform — also available as a native app for macOS, Windows, Linux, iOS, and Android
- Installable — add to home screen as a PWA for an app-like experience
- No server-side code — the entire application runs client-side
- No tracking — no cookies, no analytics, no server-side state

## Technology
- Built with Flutter (Dart) compiled to WebAssembly
- SQLite via sqflite_common_ffi_web using Origin Private File System (OPFS)
- Hive (IndexedDB) for settings and API key storage
- Requires Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin and Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy: require-corp headers

## Browser Requirements
- Chrome 119+
- Firefox 120+
- Safari 18.2+
- Edge 119+
- Any browser with WASM-GC and SharedArrayBuffer support

## API Compatibility
The web app communicates with any Coqui API server via REST + Server-Sent Events (SSE).

### Key Endpoints Used
- POST /api/sessions — Create a new session
- GET  /api/sessions — List all sessions
- POST /api/sessions/{id}/messages — Send a prompt (SSE stream response)
- GET  /api/sessions/{id}/turns — List turns with metadata
- GET  /api/config/roles — List agent roles and model mappings
- POST /api/credentials — Set a credential
- GET  /api/health — Server liveness check

## Self-Hosting
Users can self-host the web app using Docker (nginx:alpine) or any static file server that supports custom HTTP headers. Required headers: COOP (same-origin) and COEP (require-corp) for SharedArrayBuffer/WASM threading.

## Documentation Pages
- Overview: https://docs.agentcoqui.com/readme
- HTTP API Reference: https://docs.agentcoqui.com/api
- Skills System: https://docs.agentcoqui.com/skills
- Creating Toolkits: https://docs.agentcoqui.com/toolkits
- Building Apps with the API: https://docs.agentcoqui.com/app-api-usage

## Tech Stack
- Flutter/Dart compiled to WASM-GC
- SQLite (OPFS) + Hive (IndexedDB)
- Material Design 3
- PWA with service worker
- MIT License
